
<!--
Possibly make this a cheatsheet
-->

### Style {.unnumbered}

- [ ] Checklist Item 1
- [ ] Checklist Item 2

### Accessibility {.unnumbered}

- [ ] Color palette is color vision deficiency friendly
- [ ] Redundantly distinguishing groups/categories with shapes rather than color alone
- [ ] Contrast Ratio is ...

### Fairness {.unnumbered}

- [ ] Axis limits ...
- [ ] Aspect Ratio ...

### Validity {.unnumbered}

- [ ] Number of plotted data points matches expectations
- [ ] Compared values between source data and displayed data
